suggestion.description: _resolve_reviewer_agent function defined in both files with same name but different parameter semantics: execute.md version takes classifier names (critic/testing/security), orchestrator-tick.md version takes role names (code-reviewer/test-reviewer/security-reviewer). Consider renaming one for clarity.

Step 7c case block includes arms for code-reviewer-codex|test-reviewer-codex and security-reviewer|code-reviewer|test-reviewer that would only match if SELECTED contains already-resolved names. These passthrough arms are effectively dead code in the normal dispatch flow. Consider removing or adding a comment explaining when they'd fire.

No test asserts resolveReviewer('security', 'codex') returns opus/claude-code. The env-var override path is tested for security but the explicit overrideHarness='codex' parameter path is not covered. Add: it('security stays claude-native even when overrideHarness=codex', () => { const r = resolveReviewer('security', 'codex'); expect(r.harness).toBe('claude-code'); expect(r.model).toBe('opus'); })

No test for uppercase AI_SDLC_REVIEWER_HARNESS=CLAUDE. The .toLowerCase() normalization is correct in the implementation but untested. Add a test that sets process.env[REVIEWER_HARNESS_ENV] = 'CLAUDE' and asserts code-reviewer is returned.

minor.description: AC#5 test coverage for security-stays-opus is incomplete on the explicit-parameter attack surface. Tests cover AI_SDLC_REVIEWER_HARNESS=claude having no effect on security (env-var path), but do not exercise resolveReviewer('security', 'codex') or resolveReviewerByClassifierName('security', 'codex') with explicit overrideHarness. Recommended: add two tests asserting harness=claude-code and model=opus for adversarial explicit-parameter inputs.

_resolve_reviewer_agent bash function defined in prose in Step 7b must be present before Step 7c invokes it. If a human truncates the command body, AGENT_NAME would be empty causing silent fan-out failure. The REVIEWER_HARNESS fallback still defaults to claude-code (security harness doesn't degrade), but AGENT_NAME being empty would cause the agent dispatch to fail. Consider adding a guard: [ -n "$AGENT_NAME" ] || { echo 'ERROR: _resolve_reviewer_agent returned empty'; exit 1; }
